raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Parking Cash-Out (PCO) program aims to reduce vehicle commute trips and emissions.",
    "The PCO program allows employees to 'cash out' their subsidized parking and opt for transit, biking, walking, or carpooling.",
    "Employers with more than 50 employees are required to offer equal benefits to employees who do not drive to work.",
    "Many commercial real estate owners bundle the cost of parking with the cost of office space, complicating compliance with the PCO program.",
    "AB 2206 mandates that parking owners provide unbundled parking costs to facilitate compliance with the PCO program.",
    "The unbundling of parking costs can create more equity in transportation access.",
    "The City of Santa Monica has a more successful PCO program due to its own unbundled parking provisions."
  ]
}
```
